explanation: The user wants all pencils to be placed on the desk. Since no specific pencils are mentioned in the discussed_objects, I assume there are at least two pencils (pencil_0 and pencil_1) as common objects. The plan starts by picking up each pencil, moving it to the desk, and placing it there. This ensures all pencils are on the desk. The motion to go to the desk is included to ensure proper positioning before placing. Since the robot can only hold one object at a time, each pencil is handled sequentially.
